name: Partially my fault back strain at work in West Valley, can I claim?
description: Yes, workers' comp no-fault—your partial blame irrelevant.

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault back strain at work in West Valley, can I claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, workers' comp no-fault—your partial blame irrelevant.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, no-fault system ignores your fault.**

Utah comp covers regardless of negligence if work-related.[1]

- Don't admit fault to insurer.
- Prove arising from duties.
- Safety violations irrelevant.

Proceed confidently; lawyer handles pushback.[1]
